title: Module 1
content:
System On Chip Design Process: A canonical SoC Design, SoC Design
flow - Waterfall vs spiral, Top-down vs Bottom up, Specification
requirement, Types of specification, System design process, System level
design issues- Soft IP vs Hard IP.

title: Module 2
content:
Macro Design Process: Contents of a design specification, Top level
Macro Design,Top level Macro Design Process, Activities and tools,
Subblock design, Macro integration, Soft macro productization.

title: Module 3
content:
RTL coding guidelines: Overview of coding guidelines, Guidelines for
clocks and resets - Mixed clock edges, Clock buffers, Gated clocks,
Internally generated clocks, Gated clocks, Internally generated resets.

title: Module 4
content:
Developing hard macros: Design issues for hard macros – Design for test,
Clock and reset, Aspect ratio, Porosity, Pin placement, Power distribution.
The hard macro design process, Block integration for hard macros,
Productization for hard macros, Model development for hard macros, Soft
macro deliverables, Hard macro deliverables.
